mapper.select: select g.name as gymName, u.phone as gymTel, u.created_at as regDate, ifnull(count(distinct m.id),0) as gymClientCount, ifnull(sum(p.payment_price*0.9),0) as gymCal from gym g left join user u on(g.user_id=u.id) left join member m on(u.id=m.id) left join trainer t on(g.id=t.gym_id) left join payment p on(p.user_id=g.user_id) group by g.name, u.phone, u.created_at order by g.name

select u.name as trainerName, u.phone as trainerTel, u.created_at as regDate, ifnull(count(distinct m.id),0) as trainerClientCount, ifnull(sum(p.payment_price*0.9),0) as trainerCal from trainer t left join user u on(t.user_id=u.id) left join member m on(u.id=m.id) left join payment p on(p.user_id=t.user_id) group by u.name, u.phone, u.created_at order by u.name

select u.name as clientName, u.phone as clientTel, u.created_at as regDate, IFNULL(tu.name, '담당 없음') AS ptTrainer, IFNULL(SUM(p.payment_price), 0) AS payment FROM MEMBER m LEFT JOIN USER u ON m.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN PAYMENT p ON p.user_id = m.user_id LEFT JOIN TRAINER t ON p.trainer_id = t.id LEFT JOIN USER tu ON t.user_id = tu.id GROUP BY u.name, u.phone, u.created_at, tu.name ORDER BY u.name

select g.id as gymId, g.name as gymName, u.phone as gymTel, u.created_at as regDate, ifnull(count(distinct m.id),0) as gymClientCount, ifnull(sum(p.payment_price*0.9),0) as gymCal from gym g left join user u on(g.user_id=u.id) left join member m on(u.id=m.id) left join trainer t on(g.id=t.gym_id) left join payment p on(p.user_id=g.user_id)
And g.name like concat('%', #{gymName}, '%')
group by g.name, u.phone, u.created_at order by
gymClientCount gymCal regDate g.name
${sortOrder} limit #{row}, #{pageRow}

select t.id as trainerId, u.name as trainerName, u.profile_image ,u.phone as trainerTel, u.created_at as regDate, ifnull(count(distinct m.id),0) as trainerClientCount, ifnull(sum(p.payment_price*0.9),0) as trainerCal from trainer t left join user u on(t.user_id=u.id) left join member m on(u.id=m.id) left join payment p on(p.user_id=t.user_id)
And u.name like concat('%', #{trainerName}, '%')
group by u.name, u.phone, u.created_at, u.profile_image order by
trainerClientCount trainerCal regDate u.name
${sortOrder} limit #{row}, #{pageRow}

select m.id as clientId, u.name as clientName, u.phone as clientTel, u.created_at as regDate, IFNULL(tu.name, '담당 없음') AS ptTrainer, IFNULL(SUM(p.payment_price), 0) AS payment from member m left join user u on(m.user_id=u.id) left join payment p on(p.user_id=m.user_id) LEFT JOIN trainer t ON p.trainer_id = t.id LEFT JOIN user tu ON t.user_id = tu.id
And u.name like concat('%', #{clientName}, '%')
group by u.name, u.phone, u.created_at, tu.name order by
payment regDate u.name
${sortOrder} limit #{row}, #{pageRow}

select u.id as userId, g.name as userName, u.created_at as regDate, 'GYM' as authType, g.approval_status as status from user u join gym g on(u.id=g.user_id) where g.approval_status='PENDING'
union all
SELECT u.id AS userId, u.name AS userName, u.created_at AS regDate, 'TRAINER' AS authType, t.approval_status AS status FROM USER u JOIN TRAINER t ON u.id = t.user_id WHERE t.approval_status = 'PENDING'
ORDER BY regDate DESC

SELECT g.name AS name, u.email, u.phone AS tel, u.profile_image as profileImg, g.address AS address, g.address_detail AS address_detail, g.business_registration_num AS bizNum, g.br_file as authDoc FROM user u JOIN gym g ON u.id = g.user_id WHERE u.id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE gym SET approval_status = #{status} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE trainer SET approval_status = #{status} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
